offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient receipt management causes cash flow gaps. We convert receipts into standardized accounting entries instead of manual entry.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning and entry format on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
